nodes.name: M0-directional-reframe.md
nodes.summary: Spec (D-029) reframing the M0 web synthesis output as strategic 'direction' rather than committed SMART numbers, covering intake field alignment, output presentation changes, and removal of dead Max-chat UI, with acceptance criteria and a Vietnamese-language plan to fix three identified inconsistencies between the web wizard and the bot's discovery/synthesis logic.
nodes.languageNotes: Written in Vietnamese; references specific code symbols (web/app.js INTAKE_STEPS, agents/discovery.REQUIRED_FIELDS) as evidence for the spec's acceptance criteria.

nodes.name: M0-discovery-to-strategy.md
nodes.summary: One-pager planning slice for milestone M0 describing the end-to-end golden path from chat-based business discovery through diagnostic pipeline execution to rendering a real 90-day strategy page, including scope, risks, dependencies, and founder-approved decisions.
nodes.languageNotes: Written in Vietnamese; lists explicit module dependencies (agents/discovery.py, agents/pipeline.py, agents/strategy.py, storage/v2/strategies.py, webapp/business.py, webapp/chat.py) as the slice's 'Phụ thuộc' section.

nodes.name: M1-content-production.md
nodes.summary: Draft one-pager for milestone M1 specifying the two-track (always-on vs. occasion-based campaign) content production model for the web app, including data model changes, a Gantt-style calendar UX prototype, and scope boundaries, to begin after M0 is accepted.
nodes.languageNotes: Written in Vietnamese; references domain logic source modules (agents/operational_prompts.py, agents/campaign_ideation.py, agents/campaign_scope_library.py) that the web layer must mirror.

nodes.name: output-reader-editor.md
nodes.summary: Spec for a dedicated full-width reading and editing experience for AI research outputs, covering a standalone '#doc/<run_id>' page, inline manual edits, AI-assisted ('Max') paragraph edits via surgical_edit.patch_document, and version history, with acceptance criteria for each feature.
nodes.languageNotes: Written in Vietnamese; ties feature F3 directly to the backend function agents/surgical_edit.patch_document and new API routes in webapp/api.py.
